title: Star Wars: Episode I Obi-Wan's Adventures
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{VideoGame |image=[[File:SWEpIObiWansAdventures.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Episode I
Obi-Wan's Adventures'' |developer=[[HotGen Ltd.|HotGen Studios]] |publisher=[[THQ]] |release date=[[November 27]], [[2000]]{{WebCite|url=https://www.ign.com/games/star-wars-episode-i-obi-wans-adventures|text=Star Wars: Episode I: Obi-Wan's Adventures|work=[[Wikipedia:IGN|IGN]]|archivedate=20230516141059}} |closed= |upc= |engine= |genre=Action adventure |modes=Single player |ratings=[[Wikipedia:Entertainment Software Rating Board|ESRB]]: Everyone (E) |platforms=[[Wikipedia:Game Boy Color|GBC]] |series= |basegame= |expansions= |director= |producer= |designer= |programmer= |artist= |writer= |composer= |timeline=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |prev= |next= }} '''''Star Wars: Episode I Obi-Wan's Adventures''''' is a video game released in [[2000]] for the [[Wikipedia:Game Boy Color|Game Boy Color]] that retells the story of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] from the perspective of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. {{Game-stub}} ==Plot summary== The plot closely follows the film, but does not include any of the [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] scenes. Instead, there are missions detailing the approach to [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] through a series of catacombs and Obi-Wan's mission aboard the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] landing craft. It is also the only game based on ''Episode I'' that allows the player to pilot a [[Tribubble bongo/Legends|bongo]], and also allows Obi-Wan switch to using a blaster during gameplay. ==Appearances== {{IncompleteApp}} {{App |characters= *[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] *[[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] *[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] *[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Queen Amidala]] *[[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] *[[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] *[[Sio Bibble/Legends|Sio Bibble]] *[[TC-14/Legends|TC-14]] |droid models= *[[Battle droid/Legends|Battle droid]] **[[OOM-series battle droid/Legends|OOM-series battle droid]] *[[Droideka/Legends|Droideka]] |locations= *[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] **[[Theed/Legends|Theed]] |organizations=
